title: China Continues to Be the Economic Outlier
section_path: China Continues to Be the Economic Outlier
section_path_text: China Continues to Be the Economic Outlier
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
Industrial production in China keeps rising, with the data for October showing better than expected growth and in line with the previous month's strong growth. The Chinese economic strength is at odds with most other countries, which again are grappling with rising COVID19 infection rates and new social restrictions. High-frequency data recently published by Bloomberg also showed economic activity dropping sharply in Europe, as new lockdowns and curbs take effect.
